examples: A new colorimetric method for measurement of serum glycosyl protein is described.
For example, simple colorimetric assays developed for artemisinins have been used successfully to identify fake artesunate antimalarials.
The whole system was calibrated by standard lamp with the standard transferred from the national primary photometric and colorimetric standard.
The product of a decade of research in colorimetric sensor arrays, it works when dipped into the substance, and takes about two minutes to get results.
